title: Staff
description: A staff member who can be scheduled to sites. Includes employees, subcontractors, and labour-hire workers.

staff_id.description: Internal canonical ID. Generated on import if not provided.

tenant_id.description: Owning tenant. Set automatically by import context.

external_id.description: Customer's own ID for this staff member (payroll number, HR system ID, etc). Preserved for round-trip exports.

preferred_name.description: What the person actually goes by on site. Often a nickname.

email.description: Primary email. Used for invitations and notifications.

phone.description: Primary mobile. Stored as E.164 where possible (e.g. +61412345678).

employment_type.description: Engagement type. Drives leave entitlements, charge-out treatment, compliance requirements.

trade.description: Primary trade discipline. Free text but suggested values controlled.

start_date.description: Date the person started with the business. ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: Date the person finished (if applicable). Null = currently active.

hourly_rate_cost.description: Cost rate per hour (what the business pays). AUD. Sensitive — hidden from non-admin roles.

hourly_rate_charge.description: Charge-out rate per hour (what clients are billed). AUD.

home_base.description: Where the person typically starts the day. City, suburb, or depot.

default_site_id.description: Site this person is usually at. Resolved by FK match on import.

active.description: Whether this person is currently active. Defaults true on import.

notes.description: Free-form notes. Not used in scheduling logic.

imported_at.description: When this record was last imported. System-managed.

imported_from.description: Source of the import (filename, system name). System-managed.

x-eq-cross-field-rules.message: End date must be on or after start date.

x-eq-cross-field-rules.rule: hourly_rate_charge == null OR hourly_rate_cost == null OR hourly_rate_charge >= hourly_rate_cost
x-eq-cross-field-rules.message: Charge rate is below cost rate. Confirm or correct.
Inactive staff should have an end date.

x-eq-import-hints.description: Common patterns for importing staff lists from various sources.

common_sources.name: Generic HR/payroll export
watchouts: Hourly Rate may be cost or charge — ask user
Type may use codes like FT/PT/SUB

common_sources.name: MYOB / Xero employee export
watchouts: Card ID maps to external_id, not staff_id
Pay Basis maps to employment_type via alias

common_sources.name: Hand-built spreadsheet
watchouts: Often missing required fields — flag for user
